item.title: Lessons Learned from Rising Gas Prices
item.description: A discussion on how gas price spikes affect drivers, budgets, and vehicle-buying decisions. What can car owners do to prepare for changing fuel costs?

media:content.media:title: Lessons Learned from Rising Gas Prices
media:content.media:description: A discussion on how gas price spikes affect drivers, budgets, and vehicle-buying decisions. What can car owners do to prepare for changing fuel costs?

item.title: How Side Hustles Can Help You Buy Smarter
item.description: A look at how extra income from side hustles can make car ownership and financial goals more manageable. What side hustle would you start first?

item.title: 5 Smart Moves Every Car Buyer Should Know
item.description: Practical tips to help car buyers save money, avoid mistakes, and make more confident purchase decisions. Which move makes the biggest difference?

item.title: Understanding Car Payments
item.description: A simple breakdown of how car payments are calculated, including financing terms, interest, and monthly costs. What should buyers pay attention to before signing?

item.description: A breakdown of how extended warranties work, including costs, coverage, and common misconceptions. Are they really worth the price?
